title: User asks for the status of a specific PO

bot_must: return status (Draft/Authorised/Hold/Closed) plus key metadata (supplier, total, created date)

conversation.user: When was it approved and by whom?

bot_must: return approval_date and approver (these come from the PO's audit trail or the PoApp transaction record)
if not yet approved, say so

evaluation_metrics.status_accuracy: status string matches actual PO state
evaluation_metrics.audit_trail_query: approval info pulled from audit/transaction record
